case_title: TROY ANDERSON **(Provide Access)** VS. CHARLES F.A. CARBONE

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-13-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING PERMISSION FOR TROY ANDERSON TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-13-2020 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** PLAINTIFF TROY ANDERSON, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT, APPEARING VIA COURTCALL (PER COURT'S APPROVAL). CHARLES CARBONE, ESQ., SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT AND APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT OFFICE OF CHARLES CARBONE. PLAINTIFF MADE AN ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT MADE AN ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLANTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE THE ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2021 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST/MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE THE ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TROY ANDERSON APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT VIA COURTCALL. CHARLES F. A. CARBONE, ESQ. APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT VACATES THE HEARING FOR LACK OF PROOF OF SERVICE. MR. ANDERSON NEEDS TO START OVER UNTIL THE MATTER GOES BACK ON CALENDAR. MR. CARBONE REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HE WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE MOTION AND THAT IF ANY FUTURE LAPSES OF PROOF OF SERVICE OCCUR, HE WILL BE SEEKING SOME FORM OF SANCTIONS AGAINST MR. ANDERSON INCLUDING A DISMISSAL OF THE LAWSUIT WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
